description: Machine-readable record of all schema additions and changes across all 7 monitors. Cron agents read this at Step 0 to understand what fields they are expected to produce and since when. Append-only — never delete entries.

entries.description: Blueprint v2.0 baseline — all monitors launched with schema_version 2.0

executive_briefing block added: system_stress_label, system_stress_direction, system_average_score, regime, regime_conviction, summary, one_number_to_watch, one_indicator_lying, base_case_label, base_case_probability
domain_indicators object added: 6 domains × ~4 indicators each
tail_risks array added: id, label, likelihood (0-1), impact (0-1), direction, note. Powers the risk heatmap on dashboard.
entries.methodology_ref: Horizon Matrix probabilities for likelihood; (affected_classes/8 × avg_score_change × 1.5) for impact

entries.description: scenario_analysis array: 3 scenarios (Base Case, De-escalation, Fast Cascade) with label, name, probability, horizon, description. Probabilities must sum to 1.0.
real_m2 extended to full 5-deflator stack: nominal, vs_cpi, vs_pce, vs_core_pce, vs_ppi, vs_core_ppi, direction, note
hard_landing_risk: score (0-1), direction, note. Sourced from IMF WEO and composite leading indicators.
regime_shift_probabilities: stay_stagflation, deflationary_bust, inflationary_boom, goldilocks. Must sum to 1.0. Also mirrored in executive_briefing.
sentiment_overlay top-level section: fed_funds_futures (5 FOMC meetings with cut_probability and our_view AGREES/DISAGREES), prob_zero_cuts_2026, matt_agreement_pct
indicator_type added to every domain indicator: SA (Strategic Anchor), CC (Cycle Coincident), TS (Tactical Signal). Canonical mapping fixed in cron prompt.

entries.field: electoral_watch / digital_civil / autocratic_export / state_capture / institutional_pulse / legislative_watch / research_360 / networks
entries.description: Category B sections — specified in cron prompt from Issue 1 but never produced due to output truncation. Two-pass commit fix applied 2026-04-01. First expected appearance: Issue 4 (Mon 7 Apr).
All 7 cron prompts now enforce a two-pass commit pattern. Pass 1: core sections. Pass 2: deep sections patched onto Pass 1 JSON via gh API read-modify-PUT. Verification step required before Step 3.

escalation_velocity: direction (Accelerating/Steady/Stable/Decelerating), week_over_week_delta (sum of I1-I6 deviation changes vs prior week), consecutive_weeks_direction, note. velocity_history appended to persistent-state per conflict.

esc_score: raw (weighted sum of I1-I6 deviations), band, methodology_note. Weights: interstate I3×2.0, I2×1.5, others×1.0; intrastate I6×1.5, I2×1.5, I3×0.5, others×1.0. esc_score_history appended to persistent-state.

negotiation_status: status (None/Backchannel/Formal Talks/Ceasefire Holding/Ceasefire Violated/Post-Agreement), mechanism, confidence, last_updated, note. Carries forward unless new Tier 1-2 evidence changes it.

lagrange_point_dimensions in persistent-state.kpi_state: 6 pillars (defence, energy, technology, finance, materials, institutions) each with score (0-100), direction, note. Powers Autonomy Radar chart on dashboard. Also composite_index_history appended each issue.
